P1.description: system_doctor.py is truncated — main() body incomplete and no __main__ guard; script is a silent no-op (exit 0, no output). Daily health check cannot run.

regime.headline: REGIME RED (operator-signed 260607, score 41, down 18). The Friday binary the 260603 grade warned about fired hot: NFP +172K vs 85K extinguished the cut pillar and the market now prices a possible HIKE by year-end. TNX 4.55% is ABOVE the 4.45% abort-trigger — no new deployment on either track. Equity risk-off (Nasdaq -4.18%), metals flushed (silver -7.17% to $68.57, gold -3.27% to 2026 low). Offsets: oil deflating, RBI reserves up, silver positioning washed-out. Existing positions: HOLD, no exit trigger hit. Decision window = CPI Jun-11 then Warsh-debut FOMC Jun-16/17.

gates.note: ABORT-TRIGGER FIRED — closed 4.55% post-NFP (CNBC), 10bp through the gate it cleared on 260603 (4.43%). S5.2 blocks all new tranches. Re-arm only on daily close back below 4.45%. (MACRO_REGIME 260607)
+0.65% post-NFP to ~99.9, highest since Apr-7 — cushion to the 102 reduce-gate down to ~2.1 and momentum is UP. >102 weekly close = reduce-50 (V-06). (MACRO_REGIME 260607)

Inside the >94 PAUSE band (5.2a) — new tranches paused on this leg independently of TNX. RBI held 5.25 (3rd hold); reserves ROSE to $682.3B so no defensive burn at the MPC. Structural bias to 100+ unchanged; sub-gate prints are traps (CREDIT_RISK H4). (CREDIT_RISK 260607)

RE-VERIFIED from host 260607 — FRED reachable (was a sandbox-only block). Latest available print 946bp as_of Jun-4 (one session fresher than the Jun-1 read; spreads flat Mon-Thu) = ~54bp headroom. STILL PRE-CRASH: FRED publishes T+1, so the Friday Jun-5 post-NFP / -4.18%-Nasdaq spread does not land until Mon Jun-8. SLV 5-day net -$320M (outflow into the flush; 1-month +$95M; holdings 482.9Moz as_of Jun-5; FLOW_POSITIONING) corroborates risk-off — treat the 54bp headroom as thinning, not safe. Status WATCH not OK (post-crash unpriced + thin headroom), no longer PENDING (live Jun-4 now in hand). Re-run fetch_macro_weekly Mon Jun-8 for the decisive post-crash print. (CREDIT_RISK 260607)

War premium DEFLATING — Israel-Lebanon agreed to implement ceasefire (Jun-4, oil fell ~3%), Hormuz open during truce, China crude imports 10-yr low. Fragile — Hezbollah rejected terms, Israeli ops continue, Iran UNSIGNED; reversal re-arms S10.1. Disinflationary offset is the one regime-positive this week. (COMMODITIES 260607)
VERIFIED 682.321B (RBI WSS as_of 2026-06-05, auto-scraped 260607) — reserves ROSE through the MPC week; no defensive USD-sell. Cushion still thin (~$2.3B) but direction healthy. (CREDIT_RISK 260607)

binding_gate.note: +0.65% post-NFP to ~99.9, highest since Apr-7 — cushion to the 102 reduce-gate down to ~2.1 and momentum is UP. >102 weekly close = reduce-50 (V-06). (MACRO_REGIME 260607)

catalysts.event: US CPI (May) — vs the 3.9% auto-RED ceiling; Fed-pivot pricing input.
FOMC decision Jun 16-17 (first under Warsh) — dot plot + presser. Silver T3/F2 directional decision; equity regime read.
US PCE deflator (May, core) — Fed's preferred inflation gauge.
Ongoing: US–Iran ceasefire UNSIGNED — a reversal re-spikes oil + re-arms the §10.1 correlated cascade (silver + INR + rates).
US Employment Situation (June NFP) — first Friday (Jul-4 holiday may shift release per BLS schedule).
Q1 FY27 (Apr-Jun) Indian earnings season opens — IT majors (TCS held) typically report first ~mid-July. Confirm specific board dates via NSE/BSE filings before acting (directional).
FOMC decision Jul 28-29 — second Warsh meeting; dot-plot follow-through.
RBI MPC resolution (bi-monthly, early-Aug window) — confirm exact date on RBI calendar.
US Employment Situation (July NFP) — first Friday.
US Employment Situation (Aug NFP) — first Friday.
FOMC decision Sep 15-16 — quarterly SEP / dot-plot refresh.

template.source: DR corpus (defence-railways brief); HBL IR / concall guidance
template.notes: TEMPLATE (exited). The canonical 'orders won != orders executed': fat order book + Kavach guidance, but actual ~1,452 cum route-km vs a 5,000-5,500 km/yr pace required -> execution running ~27% of the guidance-implied pace; must 3-4x. execution_pace_ratio = 1452 / 5500. Book-to-bill would look great; execution rate exposes the cliff.
